zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina von Meißen於大約1190年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯時，她的父親Markgraf Albrecht der Stolze von Meißen33歲，母親Žofie Přemyslovna24歲。她與Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1251年享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Meißen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Dieter, Ernst.
North German and Dutch: patronymic from   Mein   1.

variants.name: Mein
meanings: German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Maino, Meino, a short form of various compound names with the first element magin ‘strength, might’, for example Meinhardt . Compare Main 7.
German: nickname from Middle High German mein ‘mean, nasty’.

Scottish and English: perhaps a variant of Main or Meen. Meen is either a nickname from Middle English mene ‘inferior, lowly; poor; unpleasant’, from the Middle English personal name Mene (which is of uncertain origin). Alternatively, it could conceivably be a habitational name from East and West Meon (Hampshire), which take their names from the river Meon (of unexplained etymology).

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Christina von Meißen was born about 1190, in Meißen, Saxony, Germany, her father, Markgraf Albrecht der Stolze von Meißen, was 33 and her mother, Žofie Přemyslovna, was 24. She married Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1251, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christina von Meißen est née environ 1190, à Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Markgraf Albrecht der Stolze von Meißen, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Žofie Přemyslovna, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1251, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christina von Meißen um 1190 in Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Markgraf Albrecht der Stolze von Meißen 33 und ihre Mutter Žofie Přemyslovna 24. Sie hat Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1251 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christina von Meißen è nata il circa 1190 nel Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Markgraf Albrecht der Stolze von Meißen, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Žofie Přemyslovna, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1251, all'età di 62 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Christina von Meißen(이)가 대략 1190년 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Markgraf Albrecht der Stolze von Meißen(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Žofie Přemyslovna(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1251년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina von Meißen родилась около 1190 г. в местности крис миssен, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Markgraf Albrecht der Stolze von Meißen было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Žofie Přemyslovna, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1251 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

Se casó con Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1251, a la edad de 62 años.
